glossaryTerms.definition: A group of exercises performed in rotation for multiple rounds, with minimal rest between exercises and longer rest between rounds.
A group of exercises performed back-to-back as one continuous set with no rest until all are completed.
Rate of Perceived Exertion. A scale from 1-10 measuring how hard an exercise feels.
Two or more exercises alternated with no rest between them. Perform one set of each exercise before resting.
